basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) has officially announced the Nurse Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official AIIMS Deoghar website. Candidates with a maximum age of 40 years and holding ANM/ GNM from a State or National Nursing Council-recognized body are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and other recruitment details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation details are not mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: ANM/ GNM from the state/national nursing council body
qualification.details: Nurse: ANM/ GNM from the state/national nursing council body. Desirable: GNM/ BSc Nursing, Proficiency in Hindi and English.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: ANM/ GNM from the state/national nursing council body

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Deoghar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Nurse: ANM/ GNM from the state/national nursing council body. Desirable: GNM/ BSc Nursing, Proficiency in Hindi and English.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation details are not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. The candidate must also submit the scanned copу of filled application form to the following email address: [email protected] before the walk-in interview. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Deoghar recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Nurse at AIIMS Deoghar. This is a contractual position offering a monthly salary of Rs. 16500.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Nurse post at AIIMS Deoghar. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess ANM/GNM from a state/national nursing council body. GNM/BSc Nursing is considered desirable for this role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Nurse position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Nurse position is 40 years. There is no mention of age relaxation in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Nurse post will receive a salary of Rs. 16500 per month. This is a consolidated monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Nurse post is scheduled for 22 July 2026. Candidates should be present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Deoghar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Deoghar is located in Deoghar, Jharkhand, with the pincode 814117. The specific venue for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.
